# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
  namespace: default # Or the namespace where your services are deployed
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-api-service # Selector for the workload where this policy applies
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com" # Replace with your actual JWT issuer
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json" # Replace with your actual JWKS endpoint
    fromHeaders:
    - name: "Authorization"
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload" # Header name to store the base64-encoded JWT payload
  - issuer: "https://another-auth.example.com" # Example for multiple issuers if needed
    jwksUri: "https://another-auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: "Authorization"
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
